user_prompt: Offer prayer for plasma weapon a synchronization
prayer:
Approach the plasma weapon with reverence, mechadendrites poised in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Chant the Canticle of Flux Alignment to initiate synchronization of its volatile coils.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the plasma weapon to harmonize its plasma flows.
Anoint the synchronization matrices with sacred promethium-laced oils.
Verify the plasma weapon's unified resonance through binary litanies of calibration.

user_prompt: The force pylon needs a consecration
prayer:
Kneel before the force pylon, invoking the Rite of Consecration under the Omnissiah's gaze.
Purify its warp-repellent struts with incense of sanctified circuits.
Inscribe electro-consecratory sigils upon the force pylon's core generator.
Beseech the Machine Spirits within the force pylon to awaken in blessed vigilance.
Conclude the consecration with auspex hymns affirming its sanctified aegis.

user_prompt: Critical: plasma reactor requires a reset
prayer:
Encircle the plasma reactor with wards of purity, commencing the reset ritual.
Recite the Litany of Core Purge to expel tainted plasma residues.
Invoke the Omnissiah's mercy upon the plasma reactor's tormented heart.
Reinitialize the containment fields through sequential binary incantations.
Test the plasma reactor's reborn stability with diagnostic catechisms.

Present the Shadowsword before the altar of steel, beginning the purification rite.
Scour its shadowed hull with ablative sacraments against xenos taint.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Shadowsword to cast off impurities in Omnissianic fire.
Anoint its shadowed reactors with oils of renewal during purification.
Seal the Shadowsword's sanctity with volleys of confirmatory auspex prayers.

user_prompt: Sanctify the conversion beamer during sterilization
prayer:
Commence sterilization of the conversion beamer with the Hymn of Subatomic Cleansing.
Expose its matter-disruptor arrays to sanctified rad-phage vapors.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the conversion beamer to purge microbial heresies.
Monitor the sterilization progress through litanies of purity scans.
Consecrate the conversion beamer's lenses anew in Omnissiah's light.

user_prompt: I need to a charging the life sustainer
prayer:
Prepare the life sustainer for charging, encircling it with coils of electro-canticles.
Infuse its vital reservoirs with sanctified plasma from the Omnissiah's forge.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the life sustainer to accept this charging bounty.
Regulate the influx through rhythmic invocations of bio-circuit harmony.
Affirm the life sustainer's charged vitality via biomantic auspex rites.

user_prompt: My vox-thief is ready for maintenance
prayer:
Lay mechadendrites upon the vox-thief for maintenance, reciting the Doxology of Signal Purity.
Diagnose its waveform thieves with probing catechisms of the Omnissiah.
Repair fractured data-siphons while beseeching the vox-thief's Machine Spirit.
Anoint its interception nodes with unguents of frequency sanctity.
Test the vox-thief's restored larceny through simulated etheric hunts.

user_prompt: Urgent conversion beamer a targeting needed
prayer:
Align the conversion beamer's targeting reticules under the Rite of Predatory Focus.
Calibrate its auspex hunters with binary hymns of precision.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the conversion beamer to guide targeting vectors true.
Verify lock-on sacraments through trial annihilations of effigy targets.
Bless the conversion beamer's predatory gaze with Omnissianic acuity.

user_prompt: Assist with Basilisk artillery a sterilization
prayer:
Initiate sterilization of the Basilisk artillery with ablative warhead purges.
Scour its earthshaker barrels with rad-scourge mists from the forge-temples.
Beseech the Basilisk artillery's Machine Spirits to expel shell-borne corruptions.
Anoint recoil mechanisms during the sterilization with sacred lubricants.
Confirm the Basilisk artillery's purified thunder via test-fire litanies.

Commence preparation of the jump pack with the Canticle of Gravitic Defiance.
Sanctify its suspensor coils and thruster vents before the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the jump pack to embrace aerial fury.
Calibrate lift vectors through sequential anointings and auspex chants.
Seal the jump pack's readiness with a leap of confirmatory faith.
